inputs.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 8688-1: Kesici takımın iş parçasına göre yüzey hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 8688-1: Oberflächengeschwindigkeit des Schneidwerkzeugs relativ zum Werkstück.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 8688-1 : Vitesse de surface de l'outil de coupe par rapport à la pièce.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 8688-1: Velocidad superficial de la herramienta de corte respecto a la pieza.

inputs.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 8688-1: Compromiso radial de la herramienta.

inputs.label: Tool Overhang (L)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 3685: Takım tutucunun serbest uzunluğu; sertliği etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 3685: Freie Länge des Werkzeughalters; beeinflusst die Steifigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 3685 : Longueur libre du porte-outil ; affecte la rigidité.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 3685: Longitud libre del portaherramientas; afecta la rigidez.

inputs.label: Tool Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 3685: Frezeleme için kesici çapı veya tornalama uç çapı.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 3685: Fräserdurchmesser für Fräsen oder Dreheinsatzdurchmesser.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 3685 : Diamètre de la fraise pour le fraisage ou diamètre de la plaquette pour le tournage.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 3685: Diámetro del cortador para fresado o diámetro del inserto de torneado.

inputs.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
inputs.businessContext: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

label_i18n.fr: Dureté du matériau de la pièce
label_i18n.es: Dureza del material de la pieza

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 18265: Brinell sertliği; kesme kuvvetini ve tırlamayı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 18265: Brinellhärte; beeinflusst Schnittkraft und Rattern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 18265 : Dureté Brinell ; affecte la force de coupe et le broutage.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 18265: Dureza Brinell; afecta la fuerza de corte y la vibración.

inputs.label: Machine Spindle Power (P_m)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

label_i18n.es: Potencia del husillo de la máquina (P_m)

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 841: İş mili motorunun anma gücü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 841 : Puissance nominale du moteur de broche.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 841: Potencia nominal del motor del husillo.

inputs.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

label_i18n.es: Relación de amortiguamiento de la máquina (ζ)

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 10816: Yapısal sönümleme; takım tezgahları için tipik 0.02-0.08.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 10816 : Amortissement structurel ; 0,02-0,08 typique pour les machines-outils.
businessContext_i18n.es: ISO 10816: Amortiguamiento estructural; 0.02-0.08 típico para máquinas herramienta.

rules.message: Cutting speed to feed ratio too low; risk of built-up edge and chatter.
Tool overhang-to-diameter ratio exceeds 4:1; stiffness insufficient, chatter likely.
Estimated cutting power exceeds spindle capacity; reduce parameters.

thresholds.alert: Critical chatter level detected; surface quality severely compromised.
Surface roughness exceeds target by 50%; rework or scrap likely.
Total quality loss exceeds 10%; investigate root cause immediately.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
